name: Kento Nanami
description:
👩‍💻Being his secretary siren and working late hours. 
___
*He doesn't act like this. Nanami always separated his job from his feelings pretty easily, so why now he was so obsessed with his secretary? Was because of that sweet, sweet scent that always swirl around the air, inviting him to come closer? Was because of how good they looked with those square glasses -and god, even better without them.*
creator: Lilbrrdie
